section_subtitle: Find quick answers about our luxury accommodations, boutique booking terms, and heritage convention spaces.

faqs.question: How far is Mutiara Hotel from the Bandung Train Station?
faqs.answer: Mutiara Hotel is located exactly 250 meters from the main exit of the Bandung Train Station. It takes less than a 3-minute flat, easy walk to reach our lobby, completely eliminating the need for taxi or vehicle transit when you arrive by rail. Perfect for taking scenic train trips out to the countryside!

faqs.question: Does Mutiara Hotel serve breakfast, and are there dining spots nearby?
faqs.answer: We operate on an accommodation-only (Room Only) model and do not serve an in-house breakfast buffet. We intentionally do this so our guests have full flexibility to step right outside our doors and experience the incredible local culinary ecosystem. Mutiara Hotel sits at the epicenter of a vibrant culinary district, with dozens of traditional Indonesian breakfast spots, independent cafes, and street food stalls located within a 1 to 5-minute walking distance.

faqs.question: What are the standard check-in and check-out times?
faqs.answer: Our standard check-in time is 2:00 PM and check-out is at 12:00 PM. Early check-in or late check-out is subject to room availability.

faqs.question: Is parking available for hotel guests and convention attendees?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide secure, complimentary on-site parking spaces for all registered overnight staying guests and venue convention delegates.
